description.value:
**Benefit:** Select one type of weapon, such as longsword. You are always considered to be proficient with modified weapons of that type.

**Normal:** A modified weapon is treated as one category more difficult to wield.

**Special:** A warpriest with the focus weapon class feature can gain this feat with his deity’s favored weapon in place of his bonus Weapon Focus feat. A magus with the kensai archetype can gain this feat with his chosen weapon in place of his bonus Weapon Focus feat.
